```bash

```

or the short form:

```bash
-nosummary
```

Examples:
```bash
red -T 10.10.10.10 -i -nmap --no-summary
red -T 10.10.10.10 -i -nxc -no-summary

output_preview:
Added a one-time session command.

In interactive mode, use:
```bash
set summary off
```

To turn it back on:
```bash
set summary on
```

How it works now:
- `set summary off` disables the appended cl
